---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in amph-v2 (greenfield)
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: projectamazonph
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

- Browser and version:
- Device (mobile / tablet / desktop):
- Screen size:
- Operating system:
- Branch / commit SHA:
- Account role (student / admin / super admin):

## Logs

Paste relevant logs from the browser console, server output, or Sentry. **Redact any tokens, session cookies, or PII before pasting.**

## Severity

- [ ] Blocker (cannot use the platform)
- [ ] High (core feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (annoying but workable)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic / minor)
